description: Composition Brown and blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, round slit neck, panel stitch on the chest and cuffs, abstract print, wooden beading and a vented and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only Classic patterning on contemporary styles by aneri creates this kurta for women. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
